aka: Turn Every Page: The Adventures of Robert Caro and Robert Gottlieb

cast.name: 罗伯特·A.卡洛 Robert A. Caro
比尔·克林顿 William Jefferson Clinton
罗伯特·戈特利布 Robert Gottlieb
柯南·奥布莱恩 Conan O'Brien

director.name: 莉齐·戈特利布 Lizzie Gottlieb

trans_title: Turn Every Page: The Adventures of Robert Caro and Robert Gottlieb
introduction: At 86, writer Robert Caro is working to complete the final volume of his masterpiece, “The Lyndon Johnson Years“; its editor Robert Gottlieb, 91, waits to edit it. This unique double portrait reveals the work habits, quirks, and professional joys of these two intellectuals at the height of a journey that consumed their lives, and impacted generations of politicians, activists, writers and readers.源自：http://etudoverdade.com.br/en/filme/51573-Turn-Every-Page-The-Adventures-of-Robert-Caro-and-Robert-Gottlieb
